channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gunman at White House Correspondents’ Dinner likely targeted Trump and officials, authorities say
item.description: A shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington, DC caused panic on Saturday evening after a gunman opened fire inside the Washington Hilton. According to US Ac...

item.title: Basiru Mocks Atiku Over Viral Photo at Ibadan Opposition Summit
item.description: Ajibola Basiru, the National Secretary of the All Progressives Congress (APC), has taken to social media to mock former Vice President Atiku Abubakar following a viral image showing Atiku appearing to...

item.title: Data shows Nigeria’s power generation did not exceed 6,000MW under Adelabu
item.description: This report check claim wey former Minister of Power, Adebayo Adelabu, make say Nigeria electricity generation peak pass 6,000 megawatts (MW) during him time for office. For him resignation letter in ...

item.title: Sabastian Sawe makes history by running the first sub-two-hour marathon
item.description: Sabastian Sawe stunned the athletics world by becoming the first person to complete a legal marathon in under two hours. In a dramatic final stretch of the 2026 London Marathon, the Kenyan athlete bro...

item.title: King Charles’ U.S. Visit Assessed After Nearby Shooting at Trump Event
item.description: Buckingham Palace has announced that discussions will take place with U.S. authorities to evaluate whether a recent shooting at a dinner attended by former President Donald Trump will affect the opera...

item.title: Philippine Officials Meet Czech Authorities to Clarify Zaldy Co's Status and Explore Legal Options
item.description: The Philippine Department of Justice (DOJ) assured that their ongoing mission to the Czech Republic regarding former congressman Elizaldy 'Zaldy' Co will yield results, even if he is not immediately a...

item.title: Multi-sector Program Rolled Out in Provinces to Address Child Hunger and Malnutrition
item.description: A new initiative aimed at addressing child hunger and malnutrition has been launched across several provinces in the Philippines, highlighting the continuing concern over children’s health and nutriti...

item.title: Sawe Becomes First to Complete Sub-Two-Hour Marathon in London
item.description: Kenyan athlete Sabastian Sawe made history at the London Marathon, becoming the first person to run a marathon in under two hours in competitive conditions. Sawe completed the race in 1 hour, 59 minut...

item.title: Nameless Kids return to the music scene with new release ‘Sinungaling’
item.description: Nagbalik sa music scene ang grupong Nameless Kids sa pamamagitan ng kanilang bagong awitin na pinamagatang “Sinungaling,” ayon sa ulat ng ABS-CBN News na inilathala noong Abril 26, 2026. Bagamat limit...

item.title: Donald Trump Evacuated After Armed Attacker Opens Fire at Washington Gala
item.description: For Washington on Saturday night, wahala nearly burst for the media gala as Donald Trump waka comot sharp sharp when one man carry weapons run through security. People scatter under table as gunshot r...

item.title: KSRTC Fined Rs 30,000 by Consumer Commission for Service Deficiency to Ailing Passenger
item.description: The Malappuram District Consumer Commission has fined the Kerala State Road Transport Corporation (KSRTC) Rs 30,000 for denying a seat to an ailing passenger and failing to drop him at his designated ...

item.title: Protesters in Manipur Injured During March to Chief Minister’s Residence Over Recent Child Deaths
item.description: In Imphal, Manipur, hundreds of protesters gathered on Saturday to demand justice for two children who were recently killed in Tronglaobi and to seek lasting peace in the state, which has been affecte...

item.title: The Complex Reality of Motherhood After a Traumatic Birth
item.description: A woman reflects on the emotional and physical challenges of motherhood following a traumatic birth experience. Despite yearning for motherhood for years, she was struck by an overwhelming sense of nu...

item.title: Fans gather at FNB Stadium ahead of Orlando Pirates vs Kaizer Chiefs derby
item.description: Thousands of football supporters began streaming into Johannesburg’s FNB Stadium on Sunday as anticipation built for one of South Africa’s biggest sporting events, the Soweto Derby. The highly anticip...

item.title: Protester Arrested After Spraying Chemical Agent on LAPD Officers during Demonstration
item.description: A protester was arrested after spraying a chemical agent on two Los Angeles Police Department officers outside the Metropolitan Detention Center on April 25, 2026. The confrontation took place during ...

item.title: Anne Curtis reflects on ‘Endo’ experience and praises Jasmine Curtis-Smith’s performance
item.description: Nagbahagi si Anne Curtis ng kanyang mga natutunan mula sa panonood o karanasan kaugnay ng dulang “Endo,” habang ipinahayag din niya ang kanyang pagmamalaki sa kapatid na si Jasmine Curtis-Smith. Bagam...

item.title: WHO Warns Millions of African Children Still Missing Out on Life-Saving Vaccines
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) don yan say vaccines dey prevent around 1.8 million deaths every year for Africa, but wahala still dey as about 6.7 million children never even get one routine vacc...

item.title: Shots Fired Near White House Correspondents' Dinner; Trump Evacuated Safely
item.description: The White House Correspondents' Association dinner at the Washington Hilton turned chaotic on April 25, 2026, when a gunman armed with a shotgun, handgun, and knives attempted to breach a security che...

item.title: Kerala Grapples with Rising Snakebite Fatalities, Government Assistance Announced
item.description: Kerala is facing a concerning surge in snakebite incidents, with the death toll now reaching seven in recent days. The latest victims, two elderly women in Kannur and Idukki districts, succumbed to ve...

item.title: Van Dijk backs Isak to improve after injury-hit debut season at Liverpool
item.description: Virgil van Dijk has expressed confidence in Liverpool striker Alexander Isak despite the Swedish forward enduring a challenging first season at Anfield. Signed for a British record fee of £125 million...
